info.title: VoxForge API
info.description: Text-to-speech synthesis API with voice profile management

post.description:
Convert text to audio and return the generated file.

Routes to XTTS v2 (voice cloning) if the profile has a voice sample,
otherwise uses Edge-TTS (Microsoft neural voices).
Automatically cancels if the client disconnects mid-generation.

get.description: Return the current progress snapshot for a running synthesis job.

schema.title: Response Discard Job Api Synthesize Incomplete  Job Id  Delete
Response List Voices Api Voices Get
Response List All Voices Api Voices All Get

post.description: Upload an audio sample; optionally attach it to a profile.

schema.title: Response List Profiles Api Profiles Get

post.description: Create a profile. Audio sample is optional.

Normalize text for optimal TTS output.

Expands abbreviations, numbers to words, normalizes caps,
removes decorative punctuation, and cleans up formatting.

Upload a document and return normalized text for TTS.

Supported formats: .txt, .doc, .docx, .pdf

post.summary: Convert voice tone of an audio file
post.description:
Convert the voice tone of an uploaded audio file.

Provide either a profile_id (uses the profile's voice sample as
target) or a target_sample file directly. The source audio's
speech content and prosody are preserved; only the timbre changes.

get.description: Return all built-in voice presets organized by category.
Generate a random RPG-style voice preset with name and parameters.

post.summary: Process audio with voice lab effects
post.description:
Apply voice lab effects to an uploaded audio file.

All parameters are optional — only non-zero values produce changes.
Processing is CPU-based and fast (~5s for 20 minutes of audio).
Synthesize text in one language using a voice sample from another.

schema.title: Response List Projects Api Projects Get
Response Create Project Api Projects Post
Response Get Project Api Projects  Project Id  Get
Response Update Project Api Projects  Project Id  Patch
Response Delete Project Api Projects  Project Id  Delete
Response List Chapters Api Projects  Project Id  Chapters Get
Response Create Chapter Api Projects  Project Id  Chapters Post
Response Update Chapter Api Projects Chapters  Chapter Id  Patch
Response Delete Chapter Api Projects Chapters  Chapter Id  Delete

post.description: Split a long text into chapters by headings or `---` separators.

schema.title: Response Split Into Chapters Api Projects  Project Id  Split Post
Response List Generations Api Projects Chapters  Chapter Id  Generations Get
Response List Takes Api Projects Generations  Generation Id  Takes Get

post.summary: Synthesize a chapter with per-chunk tracking
Regenerate a single chunk of a chapter
post.description:
Regenerate chunk N without re-synthesizing the whole chapter.

Finds the latest generation for this chapter, re-splits the text,
synthesizes only the requested chunk, replaces the take, and
re-exports the full audio by splicing in the new chunk.

get.summary: Get chunk map for latest generation
get.description: Return the chunk list for the latest generation of a chapter.

schema.title: Response Get Chunk Map Api Chapters  Chapter Id  Chunks Get

post.summary: List character names found in text

schema.title: Response Extract Chars Api Character Synth Extract Characters Post

post.description:
Return quality metrics for a voice sample.

Checks: duration, SNR estimate, clipping ratio, silence ratio,
peak level, RMS level, and an overall quality rating.

schema.title: Response Analyze Sample Api Analyze Sample Post
Response List Ambience Api Ambience Get
Response Upload Ambience Api Ambience Post
Response Get Ambience Api Ambience  Track Id  Get
Response Delete Ambience Api Ambience  Track Id  Delete

post.description:
Overlay an ambient track under a narration audio file.

The ambient loops to match narration length, is volume-adjusted,
and fades in/out smoothly.

post.summary: Mix a chapter's latest generation with ambient
post.description: Find the latest generation for a chapter and mix it with an ambient track.

get.description:
Return recent activity for the user dashboard.

Includes: recent generations, disk usage, and recent errors
translated into user-friendly language.

schema.title: Response Get Activity Api Activity Get

get.description:
Return the last *lines* entries from the chosen log source.

Prefers the JSONL file (lossless, with grouped stack traces).
Falls back to the text log if JSONL is not available.

Count ERROR and WARNING entries in the last N minutes.

Used by the frontend to show an error badge on the Logs tab.

schema.title: Response Error Count Api Logs Error Count Get

get.description:
Return usage statistics for the last N hours.

Scans the JSONL log for synthesis events, errors, and timing.

schema.title: Response Get Stats Api Stats Get

get.description: Return chapter generations that have a usable audio file on disk.

post.summary: Apply a batch of edit operations
post.description: Apply ``operations`` to ``source_path`` and return the new file.

get.summary: Serve an audio file by absolute path
get.description:
Serve audio so wavesurfer.js can stream it.

Only paths inside ``data/output/``, ``data/studio/``, or ``data/jobs/``
are accepted. Path traversal is blocked via ``Path.resolve`` +
``relative_to`` checks against each allowed root.

JobProgressResponse.title: JobProgressResponse
JobProgressResponse.description: Real-time progress snapshot for a synthesis job.

narration_path.title: Narration Path
narration_path.description: Path to the narration audio (from a generation)

StudioEditRequest.title: StudioEditRequest
StudioEditRequest.description: Apply a sequence of edit operations to a source audio file.

StudioOperation.title: StudioOperation
StudioOperation.description: A single edit step in a Studio batch.

StudioSource.title: StudioSource
StudioSource.description: An audio file the Studio editor can load.
